SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Card
Immutable-in-practice representation of one card used by the game model.
Desk
Represents the draw deck from which players receive replacement cards.
DiscardPile
Stores the ordered collection of cards that have already been played.
FinalController
FXML controller for the final game view (final-view.fxml).
Game
Central model for the turn-based card game.
GameLauncher
 
InvalidCardException
Thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the total game score to exceed the maximum allowed value.
Launcher
 
MenuController
FXML controller for the player-selection menu (menu-view.fxml).
PlayController
FXML controller for the active card-game view (game-view.fxml).
Player
Base representation of a participant in the card game.
PlayerHuman
Human-controlled specialization of Player.
PlayerMachine
Automatically controlled specialization of Player.
PlayerNotFoundException
Thrown when the requested player cannot be found in the current game.
